title: PRMP vs Standard HeteroSAGE on RelBench rel-avito ad-ctr (Pure PyTorch)
summary: Demo notebook comparing Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) against Standard and Wide HeteroSAGE on a synthetic heterogeneous graph mimicking the rel-avito ad-ctr schema. Defines pure PyTorch GNN layers (BipartiteSAGEConv, PRMPSAGEConv), builds 3 model variants, trains on synthetic data, then visualizes pre-computed full-scale results (200K nodes, 3 seeds) including RMSE comparison, embedding-space R², Cohen's d effect sizes, and cardinality×R² regime analysis. Mini demo data contains 55 diverse examples across all 11 FK links with full experiment metadata.
